programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Nestled in the hills of Ohio just west of the Appalachians is a very special deer camp ripe with memories from deer season’s past. With the development of the 350 Legend straight-walled cartridge by Winchester in 2019, a world of opportunities now existed in states like Ohio and Michigan. In this episode, with the 350 Legend in hand, three mature whitetails meet their maker, from the same blind, over the course of three seasons.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson closes out the half way point on the South America Waterfowl Slam. On just the third day of the hunt, he is able to take a Chilean Wigeon and a Rosy Billed Pochard which make species number 9 and 10 of the 20 on his list. Mark is still sharing the blind with Matt Gindorff, a WTA consultant, and they discuss waterfowl hunting in Argentina and how it compares to that of the U.S.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Jennifer Brooks has spent her life answering the call to serve. From flying Blackhawk helicopters on multiple combat missions during two tours in Iraq to now serving as an Air Medical Pilot and first responder, her story is one of courage, sacrifice, and humility. In this episode of Storytellers, we join Jennifer in the field for a hunt that offers a rare moment to slow down, reflect, and honor a life dedicated to protecting others.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: From time to time you have moments that will change the way think about something. That is what happened for us while hunting the Scimitar Oryx with Republic Outdoors. programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep102: Whale Sharks + Shark Hunting
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with Whale Sharks in Mexico, explores a shark hunting ritual 300 Miles off the coast of Costa Rica, and takes a Deeper Dive studying shark attacks, Whitetip Reef Sharks and Oceanic Whitetip Sharks.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep102
programme.desc: Liquid Edge leaps into canyon pools with the Deap Canyoning Team, captures a first waterfall descent with kayak superstar Steve Fisher, showcases surf cinematographer Larry Haynes, searches the world for secret surf spots via the film Planet Blow, and features an epic swell via Oakley’s Wave of the Winter.

programme.title: Blue World Ep508: Shark’s “Tonic Immobility” + Diving with NASA
programme.desc: Neal Harvey, a world-renown shark handler in the Bahamas, teaches us how to put Reef Sharks into a relaxed state known as tonic immobility. Then, we head to NASA’s Neutral Buoyancy Lab in Houston, where astronauts train for space walking underwater.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: In Search of Perfect Waves
programme.desc: A key component of The Surfing Lifestyle is to venture to lesser travelled parts of the world in search of perfect waves, and Dru Adler, Adam Bennetts and their surfboard shaper Daniel MacDonald, did exactly that in southern Sumatra where they found uncrowded perfection and adventure around every turn.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Tim heads to the Smoky Mountains for an action-packed adventure that’s as sharp as it gets. The journey kicks off at the world-famous Smoky Mountain Knife Works, the largest knife store on the planet, where Tim explores the artistry and precision behind the blades of We Knife. There, he reconnects with shooting legend Kyle Lamb, who shares his thoughts on the craftsmanship that keeps professionals equipped for anything. The action continues at Buds Gun Shop, where Tim joins Kyle once again to complete two of Lamb’s signature courses—the intense “Chaos Drill” and the dynamic “Triple Threat.” Together, they test speed, accuracy, and the mental discipline needed to master the range. But the day wouldn’t be complete without a little backwoods ingenuity. IraqVeteran8888 joins Tim for a bit of unconventional fun—combining creativity, curiosity, and some good old Redneck Science to wrap up an unforgettable episode.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Ever-increasing rainfall, coupled with monocultural farming, is eradicating the topsoil in Iowa farms. With an estimate that all topsoil in the area will be gone within 35 years, the race is on to change farming culture. Elizabeth Garst and her farm are at the forefront of the fight to educate farmers and the public on the necessity of cover crops and soil health. Elizabeth’s ancestors turned Dust Bowl land into a thriving farm with morals, and she’s not stopping there.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Take flight with The Big Reveal as Don Mann (Surviving Mann), Sheriff Mark Lamb (Surviving Mann), and Laura Zaspel (Farm Hero) visit Air Tractor—America’s iconic maker of crop dusters, firefighting, and military aircraft. Witness the power, precision, and pride behind the company proving that American craftsmanship still soars.

programme.title: Alaska
programme.desc: Journey into the beautiful wilderness of Alaska through the photography of Olof & Elizabeth Carmel. This art display film showcases their most stunning photographs of America's last great wilderness - from breaching whales and misty mountains of the Inside Passage to the Grizzlies and soaring peaks of Denali National Park. This 60 minute film will give you new appreciation for the wilderness of the wild North. Accompanied by a beautiful acoustic guitar soundtrack.

programme.title: S1E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike delivers nonstop action with the world’s top riders. Watch Rachel Atherton, downhill champion, tear through Arrowhead, CA, Aaron Gwin, gravity master, and Steve Storey, trail innovator, dominate Trail Boik Time. Join Remy Metailler, freestyle phenom, in Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, and see Gee Atherton, enduro legend, and Dan Atherton, mountain bike pioneer, push speed, skill, and style to the max.

programme.title: S1E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you inside the world of pro cycling and mountain biking. Follow Peter Sagan, multi-time World Champion, as his story unfolds, watch Loic Bruni, downhill superstar, conquer thrilling courses, and join Geoff Gulevich, trail master, as he charges through British Columbia’s most scenic and technical singletrack in an all-out Trail Party. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every ride.

programme.title: S1E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, and Nicholi Rogatkin, freestyle powerhouse, tackle the Downhill Challenge Medellín, the longest urban downhill race, with #HyperSmooth. Then join Gee, Rachel, and Dan Atherton, enduro and downhill champions, as they ride together through heart-pounding terrain. Speed, skill, and adrenaline collide in every unforgettable moment.

programme.title: S2E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch Sam Reynolds, street shredder, Clemens Kaudela, slopestyle champion, Theo Erlangsen, trail innovator, and Vincent Tupin, downhill powerhouse, in an exhilarating GoPro Course Preview in South Africa. Then head to Zion, Utah for Red Bull Rampage with Jaxson Riddle, big-air phenom, Reed Boggs, freeride master, Thomas Genon, slopestyle superstar, and Tom Van Steenbergen, trail blazing pro, as they push the limits of skill and courage on some of the planet’s most extreme terrain.

programme.title: S2E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic rides around the world. Watch Olympic gold medalist Conor Fields, BMX champion, compete at the highest level, then join GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, Geoff Gulevich, trail expert, and Sam Reynolds, street shredder, as they explore the stunning landscapes and dramatic terrain of Cappadocia, Turkey. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every breathtaking moment.

programme.title: The Squaw Man (1931)
programme.desc: An English aristocrat accused of a crime he did not commit flees to the American West, where he starts a new life and falls in love with a Native American woman. As he builds a future on the frontier, his past returns to threaten the family he has created, forcing him to face difficult choices between honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: The Rough Riding Ranger (1935
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger goes undercover to track down a gang of outlaws responsible for a string of robberies, working to expose their leader and restore law and order to the region

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies (1937)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy heads to the Rockies where he becomes involved in a dispute between ranchers and troublemakers threatening the peace of the region. With courage, quick thinking, and a few songs along the way, he works to restore order and protect those in danger.

programme.title: Saddle Mountain Roundup (1941)
programme.desc: A determined rancher and his allies stand up against a group of outlaws attempting to seize control of valuable land near Saddle Mountain. As tensions rise, courage and quick thinking are put to the test in a battle to protect rightful ownership and restore peace to the range

programme.title: Rogue of the Range (1936
programme.desc: A drifter with a questionable past arrives in a troubled town and becomes involved in a conflict between local ranchers and a gang of outlaws, ultimately choosing to stand up for justice and clear his name

programme.title: Law of Vengeance
programme.desc: 'Law and Order' may not have been in its absolute prime yet, understandable though as it was still early days at this point. The pre-Briscoe seasons and episodes were still good though, with some fine episodes and not really any that one would call a misfire

programme.title: The Fighting Westerner
programme.desc: The heirs of the dying owner of a valuable radium mine are being murdered as a mining engineer tries to uncover the killer and clear his cousin's name.

programme.title: Terror at Black Falls
programme.desc: In this western, a Mexican gunslinger is injured trying to save his son and put into prison. When he's released, he's got revenge on his mind.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade
programme.desc: In a throw-back to the1930's indie westerns, Red River Johnny gathers his friends (most of whom are called some variation of the name Bill) and returns to claim the heritage of his father who was outlawed.

programme.title: The Gambling Terror 1937
programme.desc: In The Gambling Terror, cowboy hero Johnny Mack Brown takes on a ruthless gang that’s bleeding a frontier town dry with crooked gambling and brutal intimidation. Standing tall against the odds, he fights to bring law and order back to the West. Packed with gun-slinging action, high-stakes tension, and a dash of frontier romance, this thrilling Western proves that justice always calls the final hand.
